blockers.blocked_by: Positive path now needs a real funded SOLANA/USDT payment. Collection address has been rotated to EVYe1JoVU9m46o5QLgJdZM6CCG996jfCvYoKu5DTNEjj and verified live, but the wallet remains unfunded.
Depends on liaojiang-26d; final live closed-loop acceptance waits on liaojiang-njb funded payment.

mainline.policy: Implementation and UI parity verification are accepted on mainline. The only remaining blocker is one real funded SOLANA/USDT payment that produces a valid txHash for positive-path provisioning.
